And on the home front, I'm particularly thankful to have a chance to spend time with some of my

favorite Great Danes.

For my co-workers at home.

A loving family. For my own Great Dane Chloe.

My wonderful family, friends and colleagues.

Maximus gratias. Gamsahabnida. Motshakeram. Slagivae. Jen-koo-yea. Shi-shi.

Mahalo and aloha. Thank you!

Ke itumetse. Efcharist6 poly. Go Great Danes!

You are the heart and soul of this institution, so from the bottom of our

hearts, thank you very much. Muchisimas gracias.

Okay that's a wrap, cut.
